details.test: Task 1: Enroll in weekend beginner retriever obedience class
Task 2: Choose advanced field workshop/series and submit interest
Task 3: Add three training dummies and place clubhouse pickup order
Task 4: Register for novice October field trial within 50 miles under $80
Task 5: Save two beginner gun shyness articles and add notes
Task 7: Book 60-minute evaluation with highest-rated pointing-breed trainer
Task 8: Sign up to volunteer for a Saturday event within 60 days
Task 9: Build 3-session evening training plan under $90
